user_query: I'm planning a family gathering and I want to entertain everyone with some jokes. Please fetch a random manatee joke and a programming meme to lighten up the atmosphere. Also, find some interesting facts about manatees to share with the guests.

TaskList.description: Fetch a random manatee joke to share with the gathering.
Fetch a random programming meme to add humor to the gathering.
Retrieve interesting facts about manatees to share with the guests.
